subject: Vue application creation
truth: Stop using new Vue() and use createApp() to create a Vue application instance.
quote: The global Vue API changed to use an application instance: `new Vue()` is replaced with `createApp()`.

subject: v-model on components
truth: Stop using v-bind.sync and use the reworked v-model on components instead.
quote: `v-model` usage on components has been reworked, replacing `v-bind.sync`.

subject: v-on:event.native modifier
truth: Stop using the .native modifier on v-on event listeners; it has been removed.
quote: The `v-on:event.native` modifier has been removed.

subject: keyCode support in v-on modifiers
truth: Stop using keyCode values as v-on modifiers; they have been removed.
quote: `keyCode` support as `v-on` modifiers has been removed.

subject: functional component option
old: functional: true in component options or <template functional>
truth: Stop using the functional component option or <template functional>; functional components can only be created using a plain function.
quote: Functional components can only be created using a plain function; the `functional` attribute on SFC `<template>` and the `functional` component option are deprecated.

from_fact: functional: true in component options or <template functional>

subject: async component creation
truth: Stop using plain function returns for async components; use defineAsyncComponent to create async components.
quote: Async components now require the `defineAsyncComponent` method to be created.

subject: $scopedSlots
truth: Stop using $scopedSlots; all slots are now exposed via $slots as functions.
quote: `$scopedSlots` is removed; all slots are exposed via `$slots` as functions.

subject: $listeners
truth: Stop using $listeners; it has been merged into $attrs.
quote: `$listeners` has been removed and merged into `$attrs`.

subject: $attrs contents
truth: $attrs now includes class and style attributes, which may break code that assumed they were excluded.
quote: `$attrs` now includes `class` and `style` attributes.

subject: destroyed lifecycle hook
truth: Stop using the destroyed lifecycle hook; rename it to unmounted.
quote: The `destroyed` lifecycle hook is renamed to `unmounted`.

subject: beforeDestroy lifecycle hook
truth: Stop using the beforeDestroy lifecycle hook; rename it to beforeUnmount.
quote: The `beforeDestroy` lifecycle hook is renamed to `beforeUnmount`.

subject: props default factory this context
old: props default factory has access to this
new: props default factory no longer has access to this
truth: The props default factory function no longer has access to the this context; accessing this will silently break.
quote: Props `default` factory function no longer has access to `this` context.

from_fact: props default factory has access to this
props default factory no longer has access to this

subject: binding.expression in custom directives
truth: Stop using binding.expression in custom directives; it has been removed.
quote: The custom directive API changed to align with component lifecycle; `binding.expression` is removed.

subject: data option from mixins
truth: Data from mixins is now merged shallowly instead of deeply, which may silently overwrite nested properties.
quote: The `data` option from mixins is now merged shallowly.

subject: TransitionGroup wrapper element
new: <TransitionGroup> renders no wrapper element by default
truth: <TransitionGroup> no longer renders a wrapper element by default, which may break CSS selectors or layout assumptions.
quote: `<TransitionGroup>` now renders no wrapper element by default.

from_fact: <transitiongroup> renders no wrapper element by default

subject: watching an array
old: watching an array triggers callback on array mutation (push, splice, etc.)
new: watching an array triggers callback only when the array is replaced
truth: When watching an array, the callback only triggers when the array is replaced, not on mutations like push or splice.
quote: When watching an array, the callback only triggers when the array is replaced.

from_fact: watching an array triggers callback on array mutation (push, splice, etc.)
watching an array triggers callback only when the array is replaced

subject: $on, $off, $once instance methods
truth: Stop using $on, $off, and $once instance methods; they have been removed.
quote: The `$on`, `$off` and `$once` instance methods are removed.

subject: filters
old: Vue filters (Vue.filter or | pipe syntax in templates)
truth: Stop using filters (the | pipe syntax in templates); they have been removed.
quote: Filters are removed.

from_fact: vue filters (vue.filter or | pipe syntax in templates)

subject: inline template attributes
truth: Stop using the inline-template attribute on components; it has been removed.
quote: Inline template attributes are removed.

subject: $children instance property
truth: Stop using $children to access child component instances; it has been removed.
quote: The `$children` instance property is removed.

subject: propsData option
truth: Stop using the propsData option when creating a Vue instance; it has been removed.
quote: The `propsData` option is removed.

subject: $destroy instance method
truth: Stop using $destroy() to manually destroy a Vue instance; it has been removed.
quote: The `$destroy` instance method is removed.

subject: Vue.set, Vue.delete, $set, $delete
truth: Stop using Vue.set, Vue.delete, $set, and $delete; they have been removed.
quote: The global `Vue.set` and `Vue.delete`, and instance methods `$set` and `$delete`, are removed.

subject: v-if and v-for precedence
old: v-for has higher priority than v-if on same element
new: v-if has higher priority than v-for on same element
truth: When v-if and v-for are used on the same element, v-if now has higher priority, reversing the previous behavior.
quote: `v-if` and `v-for` precedence when used on the same element has changed; `v-if` now has higher priority.

from_fact: v-for has higher priority than v-if on same element
v-if has higher priority than v-for on same element

subject: v-bind=object order sensitivity
truth: v-bind with an object is now order-sensitive, so the position of v-bind relative to other bindings matters.
quote: `v-bind="object"` is now order-sensitive.

subject: data option must be function
old: data could be an object in some cases (e.g. root instance)
new: data must always be a function
truth: The data option must always be declared as a function; using an object will break.
quote: The `data` option should always be declared as a function.

from_fact: data could be an object in some cases (e.g. root instance)
data must always be a function

subject: Vue.observable
truth: Vue.observable has been moved/removed from the global API; stop using it.
quote: Global and internal APIs have been restructured to be tree-shakable; global functions like `Vue.nextTick`, `Vue.observable` moved.

subject: Vue.nextTick global
truth: Vue.nextTick has been moved from the global API; stop using Vue.nextTick.
quote: Global and internal APIs have been restructured to be tree-shakable; global functions like `Vue.nextTick`, `Vue.observable` moved.

subject: component events declaration
new: component events should be declared with emits option
truth: Component events should now be declared with the emits option; undeclared events may cause warnings or behave differently.
quote: Component events should now be declared with the `emits` option.

from_fact: component events should be declared with emits option
